description: List view of database-table entities. Rows are rendered by the plugin's renderRow via the Host UI Kit EntityListRow (pure React + host-resolver useGetBySlug): title=name, meta=column count, subtitle=description. The plugin's own frontend.routes list route composes EntityListHeader (with the 'count' prop for the N-results counter) -> search -> TagFilterBar (tag chips via Badge) -> EntityListRow. FrontendModule has no list-header slot, so EntityListHeader is never inside renderRow. EntityListRow/TagFilterBar are experimental-tier kit components (opt-in). Data fetch must be project-scoped: /api/projects/<id>/database-tables/... from window.__C4S_PROJECT__.id. No routing (modal/drawer).
name: Database Table List
